mapper.select: SELECT ud.discount_id as disId, d.discount_cn as disName, d.discount_type as disType, d.discount_kbn as disKbn, d.start_date as startDate, d.end_date as endDate, d.discount_rate as disRate, d.discount_num as disAmount, ud.used as used FROM yy_user_discount ud LEFT JOIN yy_discount d ON ud.discount_id = d.id AND d.discount_type = '02' WHERE ud.user_type = '01' AND ud.user_id = #{customerId}
